calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-07-2019 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-12-2019 Continued To Oct-30-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion To Strike The Answer Of Deft B&H Builders Associates, Inc.; Memo Of P&A; Request For Judicial Notice; Declaration Of Andre J. Lelievre
Off Calendar Jun-10-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COLLECTION SERVICES, INC.'s Motion To Strike The Answer Of Defendant B&H Builders Associates, Inc.

Plaintiff Northern California Collection Services, Inc.'s motion to strike answer is granted. Judicially noticeable documents show that defendant improperly filed an answer in this case on March 5, 2019, even though it has been a suspended corporation since December 1, 2016. A suspended corporation lacks the capacity to defend a lawsuit. (See Rev. & Tax. Code 23301; Bourhis v. Lord (2013) 56 Cal.4th 320, 324.) The court normally would continue this matter in order to give defendant an opportunity to obtain a certificate of revivor from the Franchise Tax Board. However, because Plaintiff's counsel placed defendant on notice of its incapacity in March 2019 and Defendant has failed to oppose this motion, the court will strike the answer without leave to amend pursuant to Code of Civ. Proc., 435 and enter default against defendant B&H Builders Associates, Inc. Plaintiff has leave to seek a default judgment against defendant B&H Builders Associates, Inc.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
